description: Style Note Stylish top from mineral, perfect for the modern fashionista. A smart recombination of natural fabrics with a western construct, its a must-have this season. Product Details Lime green tunic style top, has a round neck with crochet lace detailing, puffed sleeves with elasticated cuffs, elasticated waist and a ruffled hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
